posts.text: image 1522×798 140 KB The stock is in stage 3. Target revenue growth guidance of 10 to 12% (organic) and EBITDA margin of 12%. RTH segment sill in loss and will reach break even at 400 cr topline contribution. As per management’s guidance the may happen within 2 years. Serveral risks like Freight rate variation, Paddy price incrase due to inflation, USA tarriff and CVD case With such variable risks metrics and average growth guidance, very negligible juice left in growth of stock price
